review_text: Amanda is so thoughtful and patient. She comforts me when I need it. We work together to figure out the best way to go about each treatment.
Everything was explained in detail and I felt very comfortable with the process.
Great service, made me feel comfortable and will recommend to anyone needing tattoo removed.
Amazing staff, and the Removal Specialist are so professional and helpful...

I’ve been using The Removery for the past 6 months and couldn’t be happier with the removal process.  The staff and clinicians have been wonderful and very accommodating.  Everyone from Jennifer and Hailey in the front office, to Amanda  working her magic with the laser, in the back.  If you’re looking for tattoo removal, this is the place… look no further.
Always kind!

DON'T COME HERE! The staff was nice and have nothing bad to say on how they attended me. The reason I give this place 1 star was because they are shady and lied about the prices. Make sure that you ask to get everything in writing because they quote you a certain price but then want to charge you twice the amount that was verbally agreed. They also tell you that you will need certain amount of sessions only to later need double the amount of sessions. Although I can't prove it but it was almost like they were under-treating and lowering the laser settings since some times the laser treatment was completed normal and other times didn't even do a scratch. I would not be surprised if this place is doing this in order to keep you paying for more and more sessions. Shady business, save your money and look elsewhere.
I always have a great experience at this location. Staff is very friendly and the entire place is very clean. They are always ready for me right at my appointment time. Highly recommend.
Jennifer and Hayly did amazing at explaining everything and making sure that I was comfortable! Giving me as many breaks as I needed, answering all my questions! Highly recommend!!

Removery has been great thus far! I’ve only had a few sessions and my tattoos have faded. I can’t wait to see the end results. The staff is phenomenal and their office is very nice and clean. I would recommend them to anyone wanting to get rid of tattoos that you’re no longer happy with!
Amanda is awesome! She ensures that she provides you with aftercare instructions and recommendations. Thank you, Amanda!
I love Y’all Thank you so much

I’ve been going to Removery for my laser tattoo removal and my experience has been great so far. Jennifer at the front desk is always very friendly, welcoming, and helpful with scheduling and any questions I have.
Amanda, who performs my treatments, is amazing. She is professional, knowledgeable, and makes me feel comfortable throughout the entire process. She explains everything clearly and makes sure I’m doing okay during the session.
Overall, the staff is very kind and the service is excellent. I definitely recommend this location if you’re considering tattoo removal.
Great people work here everyone is always friendly and helpful

This is my second session. I like to experience things twice before leaving a review especially when it’s a thing I will continue to do for a year. I will say my first and second appointments were great. My first appointment they were very detailed and great at explaining all the expectations from the actual process to the after care. The second appointment they were welcoming again and helpful when I described my healing experience and took the time to listen and even made small pivot in my treatment plan to make sure I’m healing properly and I appreciate that.
Jennifer, Amanda and Haley are great and continue to provide a comfortable atmosphere as if I'm going to visit friends instead of just feeling like a number. Keep up the great work!
The ladies that work her are awesome!! Even though the pain from the procedure are “very painful” the ladies make the pain go away… Would highly recommend this place!!

I appreciate all the staff and the nurses that are doing my laser removal. They are so nice and take there time if you ask them too. I would highly recommend this Recovery Removal to anyone. I'm happy with my results and as you go they are supporting you with your treatment. I give it more that 5 stars.
I love it was the best experience ever . Haely was amazing and Jennifer was really helpful .

Everyone is super professional, they walk you through the entire process answering any questions you may have, they are patient, passionate, and make the experience worth it! I’ve felt comfortable from the first day and am excited to continue the removal journey with them.

I can’t stress this enough! The whole team at Removery in The Woodlands are amazing!!! Amanda has been removing my tattoos for almost a year now and I am so pleased and happy with my results two are almost fully gone it’s amazing!!! If you’re thinking about it just do it! They’re the best!!!
I always have a quick, positive experience at Removery Tattoo Removal. The staff is consistently friendly, professional, and makes the whole process easy and comfortable every time.
Removery is always ready for me. No waiting.  I can’t wait to see the final result.  Thank you Removery.
Everyone in there is well educated at their job even the front desk lady so thats cool

The best at what they do!
Best decision ever to go to Removery!!
Highly recommend!!

Great patient care!  It didn’t hurt as bad as everyone said it would be. This place made it as painless as possible and very sweet about it. I definitely recommend them. Jennifer and Amanda were my team today and they were fantastic!!!!
The staff are extremely friendly & knowledgeable and my tattoo is almost completely faded away❣️

Removery tattoo was the best decision that I made to start my tattoo removal. The staff were very polite and helpful from the moment that I stepped into the office. They took their time explaining the process with me and the payment arrangements. I was even able to start the first session of my tattoo removal the same day as my consultation. The removal was extremely fast, and the pain level for me wasn’t as bad as I expected it to be. Thank you guys so much, can’t wait for my next visit. This process will be well worth it.
Very kind, helpful, and professional. Clean environment too. I can’t wait to see my results
Amazing work and very detailed on the process.

First time getting my eyebrows lasered to remove old ink/work i didn't like. It's super fast and Amanda is the best ! She truly makes you feel super comfortable and explains every step of the way.
She's very professional and kind.
I highly recommend her !
Thank you Amanda

I didn’t know anything about tattoo removal going in to this, so i was a bit nervous, but all my anxieties went away when i walked in. Everyone was so polite and accommodating, jennifer the receptionist was very friendly and took the time to talk me through the entire process and made me feel comfortable. I have full confidence in doing the tattoo removal process, and i had my first session and it was a very smooth process. definitely recommend if you’re looking for tattoo removal!!
Great service with a knowledgeable and professional team. I've seen major results with every session. Always love coming here! Jennifer is wonderful as well.

I had my first visit at The Woodlands location, and the staff there is so kind, informative, and knowledgeable. Jennifer and Amanda walked me through the process, science, and financing, and even got me in for my first appointment immediately. They even checked on me the next day. I highly recommend the Removery. I’ll update the review as I go through my process.

I had been thinking about getting a tattoo removed for a few years now and never worked myself up to being able to do. I was welcomed with a plan and instructions on how I would have to care for the tattoo I am removing post appointment. I enjoyed having Lauren and Haley giving me details about every single step they were doing.
Great experience!! They have payment plans if needed !!

Amanda is really great. She makes you feel as if you are old friends. She is punctual and knowledgeable. Amanda looks at each case and continues to customize your care as your body heals and recovers. I’ve been to a few different Removery’s and Amanda is the best.

Very professional, friendly, and judgment free. The staff really took time to explain the process, go over realistic expectations, and make sure I was comfortable. I have only completed one session so far but I am very encouraged and looking forward to session 2.

I had my first laser tattoo removal session at Removery and it was a great experience. Jennifer and the team were very professional, explained everything clearly, and made me feel comfortable the whole time. Healing has been going well and I really appreciated the follow-up check in!
Awesome work .
Staff was wonderful nice and caring to my situation  unfortunately  do to my seizures I could not have my tattoos removed.
Every time I see the staff at this location they are extremely friendly and very professional!! Great customer service. Highly recommend
Great place, great people
